rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component type or implementation scope based on whether the contract refers to visible ports or implementation-specific bindings.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by placing contracts in scopes that match the visibility of referenced features.
Use component type scope for contracts on visible inputs/outputs; use implementation scope only for bindings tied to subcomponents.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq to declare boolean range predicates, not direct comparisons in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent port paths in component type annexes.
